case_title: HESTER, GRETCHEN vs. ANDREW, JOHN et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HESTER, GRETCHEN AS TO DEFENDANT ANDREW, JOHN DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUL-19-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-20-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUL-01-1996
OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-19-1996, OFF CALENDAR
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE THIS DISMISSAL IS NOT INTENDED AS & SHALL NOT OPERATE AS A RETRAXIT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-19-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JUL-19-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), PLTF'S ATTY, MR. SIMSARIAN CALLED THAT HE HAS A HEARING IN FRESNO AND CAN'T MAKE IT TODAY & REQUESTED A CONTINUANCE. HEARING SET FOR AUG-19-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
